## login

## formulario 
<form _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" novalidate="" class="ng-pristine ng-invalid ng-touched"><div _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" class="form-group fg-icon fg-icon-action fg-invalid"><input _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" appinputrut="" autocomplete="username" autofocus="" class="form-control ng-pristine ng-invalid ng-touched" formcontrolname="username" id="rut" maxlength="12" placeholder="Ingresa tu RUT" type="text"><i _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" class="material-icons">assignment_ind</i><label _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" for="rut">RUT</label><!----><small _ngcontent-dhi-c3=""><!----><!---->Ingresa tu RUT.<!----></small></div><div _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" class="form-group fg-icon fg-icon-action"><input _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" autocomplete="current-password" class="form-control ng-untouched ng-pristine ng-invalid" formcontrolname="password" id="current-password" name="current-password" placeholder="Contraseña" type="password"><i _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" class="material-icons">lock</i><label _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" for="password">Contraseña</label><a _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" data-target="#"><!----><!----><i _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" class="material-icons">visibility_off</i></a><!----><!----></div><p _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" class="text-center m-0"><a _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" href="/reset?md=B">Crear o recuperar contraseña</a></p><button _ngcontent-dhi-c3="" class="btn btn-primary w-100" type="submit" disabled="">ingresar</button></form>

## Luego de elegir el beneficiario debemos escoger la prestación que se requiere.
<div _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="row"><div _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="col-12 col-md-6 mb-4"><div _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="option-box d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center position-relative rounded-sm shadow-sm p-4 px-4 card-pointer"><img _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" alt="..." class="mr-3 fontImg" src="./assets/banmedica/img/consultas_ban.svg"><p _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="text-option text-center mb-0">Consultas Médicas y Atenciones Psicológicas</p><!----></div></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="col-12 col-md-6 mb-4"><div _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="option-box d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center position-relative rounded-sm shadow-sm p-4 px-4 card-pointer"><img _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" alt="..." class="mr-3 fontImg" src="./assets/banmedica/img/examenes_ban.svg"><p _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="text-option text-center mb-0">Exámenes, Imagenología, Procedimientos y Otros</p><!----></div></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="col-12 col-md-6 mb-4"><div _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="option-box d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center position-relative rounded-sm shadow-sm p-4 px-4 card-pointer"><img _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" alt="..." class="mr-3 fontImg" src="./assets/banmedica/img/urgencias_ban.svg"><p _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="text-option text-center mb-0">Urgencias Médicas</p><!----></div></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="col-12 col-md-6 mb-4"><div _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="option-box d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center position-relative rounded-sm shadow-sm p-4 px-4 card-pointer"><img _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" alt="..." class="mr-3 fontImg" src="./assets/banmedica/img/optica-kine-fono_ban.svg"><p _ngcontent-ng-c502487949="" class="text-option text-center mb-0">Óptica, Kinesiología y Fonoaudiologia</p><!----></div></div><!----></div>

## prestación Consultas Médicas y Atenciones Psicológicas

## prestación Exámenes, Imagenología, Procedimientos y Otros
<bm-benefit-exams _nghost-ng-c4116063238=""><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="col-12 mbt p-0"><h6 _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="">1. Adjunta solo una boleta/factura/voucher por solicitud</h6></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="message message-primary mb-4 start p-3 padingr"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="message-icon bigger marginRr"><span _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="material-icons">info</span></div><span _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238=""><p _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="mbt text-alert"> Todos los documentos que cargues deben tener las siguientes cualidades: </p><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="row"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-1 mb-lg-1 doc-restriction"><ul _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="mb-0 text-alert"><li _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="">Imagen Limpia</li></ul></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-1 mb-lg-1 doc-restriction"><ul _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="mb-0 text-alert"><li _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="">Solo imagen de la boleta</li></ul></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-1 mb-lg-1 doc-restriction"><ul _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="mb-0 text-alert"><li _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="">Imagen de frente y no de perspectiva</li></ul></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-1 mb-lg-1 doc-restriction"><ul _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="mb-0 text-alert"><li _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="">Buena iluminación</li></ul></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-1 mb-lg-1 doc-restriction"><ul _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="mb-0 text-alert"><li _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="">Datos del médico legibles</li></ul></div><!----><!----></div></span></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="mb-0"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="row"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="col-12 col-md-4 mb-3"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="d-flex"><p _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="title-exams pt-0 text-left mbtt"><strong _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="">1. Boleta/Factura/Voucher</strong></p><a _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" data-toggle="modal" data-target="#modalcomprobante" class="title-exams pt-0 mrl"><i _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238="" class="material-icons text-secondary">help</i></a></div><bm-file-uploader _ngcontent-ng-c4116063238=""><id-loadfiles2 class="mt-auto" _nghost-ng-c1275871410=""><div _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410="" class="loadfile clear"><!----><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410="" id-dnd="" class="drag-area p-3 rounded-sm text-center"><input _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410="" type="file" accept="image/*,application/pdf" id="fileDropRef-hoT"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410="" class="d-none d-lg-block"><i _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410="" class="material-icons md-36 text-primary">flip_to_front</i><p _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410="">Arrastra y suelta el archivo o <label _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410="" for="fileDropRef-hoT">haz click aquí para buscarlo en tu computador</label></p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410="" class="d-block d-lg-none"><i _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410="" class="material-icons md-36 text-primary">attach_file</i><p _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410=""><label _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410="" for="fileDropRef-hoT">haz click aquí para subir el archivo desde tu celular</label></p></div><small _ngcontent-ng-c1275871410="" class="text-info">JPG/PNG/PDF. ## prestación urgencias médicas 
<form _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" novalidate="" class="ng-untouched ng-pristine ng-invalid"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838=""><h5 _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="mb-1">Datos de reembolso de urgencia </h5><p _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="mb-4">Si has recibido más de una boleta debes realizar una solicitud por cada una de ellas.</p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838=""><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="col-12 mb-3 p-0"><h6 _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838=""><strong _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="">1. Indica el centro médico de tu urgencia </strong></h6></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="row"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="col-12 col-md-6"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="form-group fg-icon fg-icon-action"><input _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" type="text" id="rut" formcontrolname="medicHolding" placeholder="RUT del centro médico" formatrut="" class="form-control ng-untouched ng-pristine ng-invalid"><i _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="material-icons">assignment_ind</i><label _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="">RUT del centro médico</label><a _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" tooltip="Debes ingresar el rut del centro médico incluyendo el código verificador" placement="top" triggers="hover"><i _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="material-icons marginRH">help</i></a><!----><!----></div></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="col-12 col-md-4 col-lg-4"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="form-group"><app-calendar _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" _nghost-ng-c2113962608=""><div _ngcontent-ng-c2113962608="" class="form-group fg-icon-action"><input _ngcontent-ng-c2113962608="" class="mat-datepicker-input form-control data-mat-calendar="mat-datepicker-1"><mat-datepicker-toggle _ngcontent-ng-c2113962608="" matsuffix="" class="mat-datepicker-toggle" data-mat-calendar="mat-datepicker-1"><button maticonbutton="" Adjunta solo una boleta/voucher por solicitud</strong></h6></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="message message-primary mb-4 start p-3 padingr"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="message-icon bigger marginRr"><span _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="material-icons">info</span></div><span _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838=""><p _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="marginBt text-alert"> Todos los documentos que cargues deben tener las siguientes cualidades: </p><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="row"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-1 mb-lg-1 doc-restriction"><ul _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="mb-0 text-alert"><li _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="">Imagen Limpia</li></ul></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-1 mb-lg-1 doc-restriction"><ul _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="mb-0 text-alert"><li _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="">Solo imagen de la boleta</li></ul></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-1 mb-lg-1 doc-restriction"><ul _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="mb-0 text-alert"><li _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="">Imagen de frente y no de perspectiva</li></ul></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-1 mb-lg-1 doc-restriction"><ul _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="mb-0 text-alert"><li _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="">Buena iluminación</li></ul></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-1 mb-lg-1 doc-restriction"><ul _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="mb-0 text-alert"><li _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="">Datos del médico legibles</li></ul></div><!----><!----></div></span></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="row"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="col-12 col-md-6"><p _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="" class="text-left mbt"><b _ngcontent-ng-c1304914838="">1. ## prestación Óptica, Kinesiología y Fonoaudiologia
